steps.title: Connect dialect and settlement
steps.content: Scottish English emphasizes the r sound in certain positions, and Upland South English shows a similar emphasis. Historical records say the Upland South was colonized largely by people with Scottish ancestry.

steps.title: Infer the direction of influence
steps.content: Choice B predicts future spread without evidence. Choice C reverses the historical direction, since the settlers came from Scotland to the Upland South. Choice D says the feature was abandoned, but the passage says it appears in both dialect regions. The answer is A.
